name: profession-ball-arena
description: 职业球球斗技场：面向 Meta 小游戏、Android 和 iOS 的 Canvas 2D 小游戏。

scripts.lint:syntax: node --check game-config.js && node --check i18n.js && node --check legal-config.js && node --check compliance-state.js && node --check services.js && node --check game.js && node --check cosmetics.js && node --check platform.js && node --check scripts/build-meta.mjs && node --check scripts/simulate-matchups.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-build-artifacts.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint:syntax && npm test && npm run test:matchups && npm run test:artifacts
scripts.test:artifacts: npm run build && node scripts/build-meta.mjs && node scripts/verify-build-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build && node scripts/build-meta.mjs && cap sync
